Works on lettuce, onions, carrots, parsnips, cabbage, leeks, cauliflower, herbs. Dimensions 417cm x variable width x 210cm, weighs 1450-1550kg. Features 3-point hitch system, covers up to 30 acres per day.

name: OZ

Versatile multi-crop robot covering garlic, onions, carrots, salad crops, spinach, celery, sweet peppers, cabbage, squash, vine nurseries, ornamental nurseries, cut flowers, seed production, herbs. Uses RTK GPS guidance.

name: JO
desc: Ultra-compact crawler robot for narrow vineyards, nurseries and berries. Performs inter-row maintenance, under-vine weeding, canopy management. Easily transportable, operates both in-row and inter-row fully autonomously. Compatible with electric or mechanical intervine tools, vibrotiller, shoot removers, can mark planting lines with RTK accuracy.

name: TED

name: Burro Original

name: Burro Grande

name: Burro XL

name: Burro

Features Pop-Up Autonomy technology, computer vision, high-precision GPS, and AI navigation. Can carry, tow, scout, patrol, mow, and serve as a platform for attachments.

name: ORIO
desc: The versatile tool carrier for vegetable crops and tree nurseries. Soil preparation, seeding, weeding. Multi-crop/multi-task autonomous robot with 4x3000W electric engines, RTK GPS navigation, 3-point hitch compatibility. Weight: 1450-1550 kg.

name: JO
desc: The crawler robot for narrow vineyards, nurseries & berries. Inter-row maintenance, under-vine weeding, canopy management. Ultra-compact, easily transportable with trailer or utility vehicle. Compatible with electric/mechanical intervine, vibrotiller, shoot removers.

name: TED

name: OZ
